text_raw: The witch of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Pailunese_RegionName#Pailune} came looking for me.
text_clean: The witch of {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Pailunese_RegionName#Pailune} came looking for me.

text_raw: Offered to help us lay old grudges to rest.
text_clean: Offered to help us lay old grudges to rest.

text_raw: She's "Resting behind a veil of deceit."
text_clean: She's "Resting behind a veil of deceit."

text_raw: We've come too far to give up.
text_clean: We've come too far to give up.

text_raw: Aye. I should let {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Tolstein#Torstein} know as well.
text_clean: Aye. I should let {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Tolstein#Torstein} know as well.

text_raw: A witch on our side wouldn't hurt.
text_clean: A witch on our side wouldn't hurt.
